scenarios.title: Azurite-backed registry returning a single component

runs.command: bombardier -o json -p result -l -c 10 -d 15s -t 30s -m GET -H Accept: application/json http://127.0.0.1:2001/stress-component-001/1.0.0?firstName=Jane&lastName=Doe
